RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crrel_table.sql
RuleSet.Descr: IBM DB/2 LUW create table relationships sql script
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ $iterate Relation( each maybecreate_TableRelation empty empty )$ commit$RunSqlStmt$
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch RelationTypeTag Superclass create_TableRelation Lookup create_TableRelation Master create_TableRelation Container create_TableRelation Owner create_TableRelation Parent create_TableRelation default empty$

ALTER TABLE $DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ ADD CONSTRAINT $DbRelationName$$ContSqlStmt$ FOREIGN KEY ($iterate Columns( each clause_FromColComma last clause_FromCol empty clause_MissingRelationColumns )$$ContSqlStmt$ ) REFERENCES $reference ToTable DbSchemaName$.$reference ToTable DbTableName$ ($iterate Columns( each clause_ToColComma last clause_ToCol empty clause_MissingRelationColumns )$$ContSqlStmt$ )$switch RelationTypeTag Superclass clause_SuperclassRelConstraints Lookup clause_LookupRelConstraints Master clause_MasterRelConstraints Details clause_DetailsRelConstraints Container clause_ContainerRelConstraints Owner clause_OwnerRelConstraints Component clause_ComponentRelConstraints Parent clause_ParentRelConstraints Children clause_ChildrenRelConstraints Unknown clause_UnknownRelConstraints default clause_UnknownRelConstraints$$RunSqlStmt$
$ContSqlStmt$ /* BAD APPLICATION MODEL HAS NO RELATION COLUMNS */
ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT
ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT
